reviews.review_description: From the minute I started the experience I started to get flashbacks of the days of playing Wing Commander on my old PC back in the 90s. The experience is nostalgic and fascinating. Keep in mind, this is a cinematic experience, not a "VR game" so approach it and purchase it with that understanding. If you truly love sci-fi, $3 is well worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 star review! We see how it might bring back nostalgic sci-fi vibes. Luckily the tech and quality is not retro at all! We are glad you enjoyed!

reviews.review_description:
I thoroughly enjoyed this experience -just too shot!! Lol 
Wish it was much longer -Can't wait for more episodes!!

developer_response.body: Thank you!! Based on many things VR related we determined 13 minutes is a good length for each episode experience. But, you want more, and more is on the way! Episode 2 is in post now and will be available in the store soon. There will be approx. 10 episodes in season 1. All shooting is complete with only post needed from here. As we complete, or have updates we will keep you informed. We will have our Oculus "Developers Posts" up soon. Facebook page is just up here https://www.facebook.com/Relativity-Theory-VR-105073764482290. Or, our site RelativityTheoryVR.com. Others coming soon.

reviews.review_description: Usually don’t dig 360 video but I had to give this a shot. 5 ⭐️ trippy all around 👽. Especially at the end 👌🏻.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 stars! As the series progresses things will get trip-ier and further out into space in many ways. Much more adventure, action, and far out FX. E1 just gets things started.
